allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('\\''unipamplona-siu.zip'\\''\); $zip.Entries | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Host "Total: $\($zip.Entries.Count\) archivos"; $zip.Dispose\(\)')
